summary: Iteration 167: HotelRunner v2 E2E Reservation Flow complete test. All 34 backend E2E tests passed (100%). Frontend HRv2OpsDashboard verified with all 19 panels rendering correctly. Mock server running on port 9999. Safety guards confirmed: shadow_mode=true, write_enabled=false.

issues: i18n translation keys showing as raw keys (common.welcome, auth.signIn, etc.) - pre-existing issue

critical_code_review_comments: E2E test flow correctly validates: mock server setup -> connection test -> pull reservations -> ingest chain (new/modify/cancel) -> duplicate rejection -> stale update rejection -> trace timeline -> confirm delivery -> dry-run operations -> ops dashboard -> safety guards
Safety guards properly enforced: shadow_mode=true and write_enabled=false verified at start and end of test suite
Mock server on localhost:9999 correctly simulates HotelRunner REST API for test-tenant
Dry-run operations (ARI push, chain, failure simulation) all working correctly with proper failure breakdown tracking
Write criteria check correctly calculates met/total criteria for write enable decision
Shadow automation panel shows correct status with 6-hourly snapshots, daily summaries, and trend data
seed_data_creation: Mock server injected test reservations: new -> modify -> cancel chain for HR-E2E-* reservation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 167 verified complete HotelRunner v2 E2E reservation flow. Backend tests cover: TestSafetyGuards (shadow_mode/write_enabled checks), TestMockServerSetup (health/reset/inject reservations), TestConnectionAndPull (connection test/pull reservations), TestIngestChain (new/modify/cancel ingest), TestIdempotencyAndStale (duplicate/stale rejection), TestTrace (timeline verification), TestConfirmDelivery (delivery ACK), TestDryRun (ARI push/chain/failure simulation/stats/write criteria), TestOpsDashboard (all panels/status/metrics/readiness/observation/automation), TestFinalSafety (write still disabled). Frontend panels verified: transition-phase-panel, readiness-score-panel, provider-health-panel, operational-actions-panel, dry-run-panel, dry-run-failure-panel, write-criteria-panel, sync-overview-panel, failure-visibility-panel, recent-events-panel, recent-drifts-panel, operations-breakdown-panel, observation-alerts-panel, observation-history-panel, automation-status-panel, trend-readiness-panel, trend-drift-panel, trend-latency-panel, trend-failure-panel. All buttons functional: test-connection-btn, trigger-auto-snapshot-btn, dry-run-ari-push-btn, dry-run-chain-btn.

test_classes: TestMockServerSetup (5 tests) - mock health, reset, inject new/modify/cancel reservations
TestConnectionAndPull (2 tests) - connection test (environment=mock), pull reservations
TestIngestChain (3 tests) - ingest new, modify, cancel
TestIdempotencyAndStale (2 tests) - duplicate rejection, stale update rejection
TestTrace (1 test) - trace timeline with raw_events, lineage, outbox
TestConfirmDelivery (2 tests) - confirm delivery, idempotent confirm
TestDryRun (7 tests) - ARI push, chain, simulate timeout/rate_limit/validation_error, stats, write criteria
TestOpsDashboard (8 tests) - ops dashboard populated, status, metrics, dlq, readiness, observation snapshot/history, automation trigger
TestFinalSafety (2 tests) - write still disabled, print summary

panels: transition-phase-panel - Write Path Gecis Durumu (Shadow -> Dry-Run -> Limited -> Full Live)
provider-health-panel - Auth/Reservations API/Shadow Mode/Write Path status
operational-actions-panel - Baglanti Testi, Reconciliation, Provider Durumu Yenile, Gunluk Snapshot Topla
dry-run-panel - Dry-Run ARI Push, Zincir Testi, Hata Simulasyonu (Timeout/Validation/Rate Limit)
sync-overview-panel - Drift count, Islem Basari, Son Reconciliation, Toplam Islem
operations-breakdown-panel - Operations table (pull_reservations, reconciliation, dry_run_ari_push, dry_run_chain, etc.)
observation-alerts-panel - Alert status (Drift, Retry, DLQ, Hata Orani, Latency, Auth Hatasi, Tekrar Ingest, Stale Rez.)
automation-status-panel - Shadow Otomasyon with Manuel Snapshot Tetikle button

mocked_api_note: Mock HotelRunner server on port 9999 simulates real HotelRunner REST API for test-tenant. This is intentional for E2E testing without hitting production HotelRunner API.
